data.title: Emcore Completes Merger and Delists from Nasdaq
data.description:
Emcore ( (EMKR) ) has issued an update.

On February 28, 2025, Emcore completed a merger, resulting in the cancellation and conversion of its common stock into cash payments for shareholders, with specific conditions for restricted stock units and stock options. Following the merger, Emcore requested the delisting of its common stock from Nasdaq and plans to terminate its SEC registration, leading to significant changes in its corporate structure, including the resignation of its board members and amendments to its certificate of incorporation and bylaws.

More about Emcore

Average Trading Volume: 149,292

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: $27.88M

data.title: Reti SpA Reports 4.42% Growth in 2024, Proposes Dividend Amidst Strategic Expansion
data.description:
An update from Reti SpA ( (IT:RETI) ) is now available.

Reti SpA reported a 4.42% increase in production value for 2024, reaching 32.29 million euros, driven by consolidating activities with existing clients and expanding its client portfolio. Despite a slight decrease in net profit, the company improved its net financial debt and proposed a dividend of 0.058 euros per share, reflecting a commitment to stakeholder value and sustainable growth.

More about Reti SpA

Reti SpA is a prominent player in the Italian IT Consulting sector, specializing in System Integration services. The company is listed on Euronext Growth Milan and focuses on leveraging digital enablers like Artificial Intelligence, Cloud, and Cybersecurity to drive innovation and sustainability.

YTD Price Performance: -5.73%

Average Trading Volume: 6,647

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

data.title: Grupo Simec Reports Decrease in 2024 Net Sales Amid Market Challenges
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Grupo Simec SA De CV ( (SIM) ).

Grupo Simec reported a decrease in net sales by 18% for the twelve-month period ending December 31, 2024, compared to the same period in 2023, attributed to reduced shipments and lower average sales prices. Despite a 168% increase in net income, the company’s operating income and EBITDA saw declines of 23% and 21% respectively, reflecting challenges in maintaining profitability amidst fluctuating market conditions.

More about Grupo Simec SA De CV

Grupo Simec, S.A.B. de C.V. is a company operating in the steel industry, primarily engaged in the production and sale of finished steel products. The company focuses on both domestic and international markets, with a significant portion of its sales occurring outside of Mexico.

YTD Price Performance: -12.02%

Average Trading Volume: 1,298

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: $4.37B

data.title: Lake Victoria Gold Expands with Imwelo Mining License Acquisition
data.description:
Lake Victoria Gold Ltd ( (TSE:LVG) ) just unveiled an update.

Lake Victoria Gold Ltd. has completed the acquisition of the Imwelo Mining License in Tanzania, marking a strategic expansion in its operations. This acquisition, along with a $3.52 million private placement with Taifa Mining, strengthens the company’s market position and operational capabilities, setting the stage for future growth and value creation for stakeholders.

More about Lake Victoria Gold Ltd

Lake Victoria Gold Ltd. operates in the mining industry, focusing on gold exploration and production. The company is primarily engaged in developing gold projects in Tanzania, aiming to become a significant gold producer in the region.

data.title: Goldman Sachs Adjusts Financial Holdings in Ryanair
data.description:
An announcement from Ryanair Holdings ( (RYAAY) ) is now available.

On February 26, 2025, The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. crossed a threshold in its financial instruments holdings related to Ryanair Holdings, with their position falling below 3% of voting rights. This adjustment in holdings, notified on February 28, 2025, reflects a shift in the financial landscape for Ryanair, potentially impacting its market dynamics and stakeholder interests.

More about Ryanair Holdings

Ryanair Holdings is a prominent airline company based in Ireland, known for its low-cost travel services across Europe. The company focuses on providing affordable air travel options, making it a significant player in the European aviation market.

data.title: Femto Technologies Secures $17 Million in Private Placement
data.description:
Femto Technologies ( (FMTO) ) has shared an update.

On February 26, 2025, Femto Technologies Inc. announced a securities purchase agreement with institutional investors, raising approximately $17 million through the sale of Common Shares and warrants. The transaction, completed on February 28, 2025, aims to support the company’s general corporate purposes and working capital. Aegis Capital Corp. acted as the exclusive placement agent for this private placement. This move is expected to bolster Femto’s financial position and enhance its market presence in the Femtech industry.

More about Femto Technologies

Femto Technologies Inc., formerly known as BYND Cannasoft Enterprises Inc., is a public Femtech company focused on female wellness. It is known for its proprietary Smart Release System (SRS) technology, which is integrated into its product, Sensera, a feminine wellness device that has been recognized as a CES Innovation Awards® 2025 honoree in the AI category.

data.title: Grupo Ezentis Approves Directors’ Remuneration Policy for 2024-2027
data.description:
GRUPO EZENTIS S.A ( (ES:EZE) ) has shared an announcement.

Grupo Ezentis S.A. has approved its Directors’ Remuneration Policy for 2024 to 2027, emphasizing the attraction and retention of qualified directors while ensuring long-term sustainability and shareholder value. The policy outlines remuneration systems, including fixed annual amounts and fees for meeting attendance, aiming to motivate directors without compromising their independence, and aligns with the company’s strategic objectives and market competitiveness.

More about GRUPO EZENTIS S.A

Grupo Ezentis S.A. operates in the infrastructure and telecommunications industry, providing services related to the development, operation, and maintenance of telecommunications networks. The company focuses on enhancing connectivity and infrastructure capabilities, primarily targeting markets that require robust telecommunications solutions.

data.title: Radius Gold Expands Tierra Roja Copper Project in Peru
data.description:
Radius Gold ( (TSE:RDU) ) has shared an announcement.

Radius Gold Inc. has secured an exclusivity agreement to expand its Tierra Roja copper project in southern Peru by 1,800 hectares, bringing the total project area to 3,670 hectares. Additionally, the company has the option to explore an extra 4,500 hectares across three new targets, positioning Radius Gold strategically within one of the world’s leading copper-producing belts, potentially enhancing its market presence and stakeholder value.

More about Radius Gold

Radius Gold Inc. operates within the mining industry, focusing primarily on the exploration and development of mineral properties. The company is engaged in identifying and expanding opportunities in key mineral-rich regions, particularly in copper production areas.

data.title: Banco Santander Grants Shares Under Deferred Remuneration Plan
data.description:
Banco Santander ( (ES:SAN) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Banco Santander S.A. has announced a transaction involving the granting of shares to Mr. David Arthur Hazell, a Senior Executive Vice-President, under its deferred variable remuneration plans. These shares, listed on the New York Stock Exchange as American Depositary Receipts, were delivered as part of deferred payments related to the years 2021, 2022, and 2023, with the transaction executed on February 27, 2025. This move reflects the company’s ongoing commitment to aligning executive compensation with long-term performance, potentially impacting its market positioning and stakeholder relations.

More about Banco Santander

Banco Santander S.A. is a leading global financial institution, primarily engaged in providing a wide range of banking and financial services. The company is known for its strong presence in retail and commercial banking, and it operates across various international markets, focusing on delivering value to its stakeholders.

data.title: Nutrien Ltd. Releases 2024 Modern Slavery Report
data.description:
Nutrien ( (TSE:NTR) ) has shared an update.

On February 28, 2025, Nutrien Ltd. released its Modern Slavery Report for the financial year ending December 31, 2024, in compliance with Canada’s Fighting Against Forced Labour and Child Labour in Supply Chains Act. The report outlines Nutrien’s commitment to identifying and mitigating risks of modern slavery within its operations and supply chains. By engaging with stakeholders and adhering to international human rights standards, Nutrien aims to ensure ethical practices throughout its business activities, which include producing and distributing crop nutrients and services globally.

More about Nutrien

Nutrien Ltd. is a leading global provider in the agriculture industry, primarily producing potash and nitrogen products and distributing crop inputs and services. The company operates a vast network of production, distribution, and retail facilities across North America, South America, and Australia, serving the needs of farmers through its retail, potash, nitrogen, and phosphate segments.
